blended.narrative: Mt. Spokane is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 4.6 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,992 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total. Strong winds with gusts to 44 mph may cause lift holds.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 1.5" of snow, highs of 33°F, gusts to 44 mph.
Tomorrow: 4" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect powder.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 3" over the past week. Current depth: 37".
